abilities.description: Creates a damaging void that slows an enemy unit and deals damage. At night, Void also mini-stuns, interrupting channeling abilities, and the slowing effect lasts longer.
abilities.name: Void
abilities.story: Balanar creates a vortex of infinite night, tearing opponents violently into the eternal darkness that once was.

abilities.description: Night Stalker horrifies all nearby enemies, causing them to become silenced and take damage over time while near him. The effect lasts longer at night.
abilities.name: Crippling Fear
abilities.story: A vision of the twisted maw of Balanar etches itself into the minds of the poor souls unlucky enough to cross his path.

abilities.description: Night Stalker is in his element at night, attacking and moving with great swiftness.
params: Passive ComponentMove Speed Bonus: 22%/28%/34%/40%Attack Speed Bonus: 20/40/60/80 ([picture:talent_tree_symbol] 120/140/160/180)[picture:talent_tree_symbol] Status Resistance Bonus: 25%
abilities.name: Hunter in the Night
abilities.story: The hunting prowess of Balanar improves as the night beckons.

abilities.description: Night Stalker smothers the sun and summons instant darkness, so that he might use his powers at their fullest. Refreshes the cooldown of all non-ultimate abilities when cast. Night Stalker gains flight and bonus damage during this time. Has unobstructed vision.
abilities.name: Dark Ascension
abilities.story: It is a humbling sight to see when the mightiest of warriors become afraid of the dark.

description: Empowered by the shadows of nightfall. The beast of bedtime tales, Balanar is the primal terror that every child knows to fear. Once the sun goes down, Night Stalker's hunt begins. Charging through the shadowy forests, he snares prey in a debilitating Void, slowing and forcing his quarry to flee, arms withering and spells fizzling as their hearts are stricken with Crippling Fear. Should sunrise threaten to end his terror, the Hunter in the Night transforms through a Dark Ascension, spreading his wings under the blackened veil of night, and goes on the prowl for ever more victims.  Carry Initiator Durable Disabler Nuker  Blue, Flying, NicePecs, Wings Legs ( 2 )
trivia: Many of Night Stalker's responses that refer to his vampiric qualities make reference to Bram Stoker's Dracula, a film adaptation of the classic novel starring Oldman.

hero_talents.talent_right: +100 Hunter In The Night Attack Speed

hero_talents.talent_left: +25% Hunter In The Night Status Resistance
